# Install convex-zen

This install tree is organized by framework and by starting state so humans and LLM agents do not need to infer the right path.

## Supported frameworks

- Next.js App Router
- TanStack Start

## Choose the matching guide

### Next.js

- From scratch or framework app without Convex:
  `apps/docs/external/install/next/from-scratch.md`
- Existing Next.js + Convex, no auth:
  `apps/docs/external/install/next/add-to-existing-convex.md`
- Existing Next.js + Convex Auth:
  `apps/docs/external/install/next/migrate-from-convex-auth.md`
- Existing Next.js + Better Auth:
  `apps/docs/external/install/next/migrate-from-better-auth.md`

### TanStack Start

- From scratch or framework app without Convex:
  `apps/docs/external/install/tanstack-start/from-scratch.md`
- Existing TanStack Start + Convex, no auth:
  `apps/docs/external/install/tanstack-start/add-to-existing-convex.md`
- Existing TanStack Start + Convex Auth:
  `apps/docs/external/install/tanstack-start/migrate-from-convex-auth.md`
- Existing TanStack Start + Better Auth:
  `apps/docs/external/install/tanstack-start/migrate-from-better-auth.md`

## Shared migration guidance

- Generic auth replacement checklist:
  `apps/docs/external/install/shared/migration-checklist.md`

## Canonical examples

- Next.js: `apps/next`
- TanStack Start: `apps/tanstack`
